evidence_summary: [CH009_SC001] Purpose: Establish a debt of honor and introduce a new ally.

[CH009_SC001] Summary: While traveling near the river, the Tin Woodman kills a predatory yellow Wildcat that was attacking a small field mouse. The mouse reveals herself to be the Queen of all the Field Mice. After a brief tension where the Woodman protects...
[CH009_SC001] Coverage: Low-angle shots for the Wildcat attack. Extreme close-ups (ECU) of the Queen Mouse to establish her character. Medium shots of the group reacting to the revelation.
[CH009_SC001] Continuity: The position of the dead Wildcat; the proximity of Toto to the mice during the confrontation.

[CH009] Chapter summary: **Setting:** A grassy field near a river, adjacent to a poppy bed. **Characters:** - Dorothy - Scarecrow - Tin Woodman - Toto - The Queen of the Field Mice (and her subjects) - The Cowardly Lion (unconscious) **Events...
